    • +
      354.Player: It could be nothing, all the same. Lands like these must have seen all sorts, throughout the years.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a02c5de9-eed0-acd0-2317-4be5b3dc3128Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h54443d34g7b78g4be7gb91dg06fb3176c093Text UUID: 672dccdf-8cad-4047-aca8-36320e1a500aShow Once: True
      • •
        135.ShadowheartIllusion: Still... there may be more to it. I need to keep alert, in case that suspicion amounts to anything.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3b4783d0-cf2a-b468-0197-6e376603e9ddSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hbd93dd71g5e86g42fdg9836gb7f730cc9f26Text UUID: cd6b87d5-909f-425f-a725-764043a36beeTimeline Phase Index: 99Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3b4783d0-cf2a-b468-0197-6e376603e9ddTimeline Phase Duration: 7.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
    • +
      196.Player: Coincidence is more common than destiny, in my experience. Don't get your hopes up.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5854c848-c64b-98de-82e9-c805243f3506Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h2501d1c4g3d5eg4658gb455gfac47a79e0d4Text UUID: 6d21b4b4-bee8-40cb-91b1-667650e6848cShow Once: True
      • See Node 135 (ShadowheartIllusion) Still... there may be more to it. I need to keep alert, in case that suspicion amounts to anything.
    • +
      167.Player: Perhaps your predecessors and mine came to blows around here, sometime long ago.Selûne

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
      • Selûne {4533d292-5b1f-43c7-ad44-6bc7db1000ca} = True

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 485892d5-d8bb-633f-1eeb-705b6c5772bcSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h90c2c545g6638g4752ga588gd7ce38cbbc5fText UUID: 845b330c-fd77-413a-8f7c-2a883c2f8cc7Show Once: True
      • •
        247.ShadowheartIllusion: Likely, yes. Our goddesses' quarrel began long before you or I were alive. I'll wager it'll continue long after we're both dead.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6c4e3bed-00e5-070a-27fe-3ea695f8102eSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h2351c431g06feg4802g8a16gbfcd24144488Text UUID: f721f2f6-1c67-48e0-bed3-fbd115f039bdTimeline Phase Index: 114Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6c4e3bed-00e5-070a-27fe-3ea695f8102eTimeline Phase Duration: 10.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2

    184.ShadowheartIllusion: So there's been a mind flayer inside the artefact - or Astral Prism - the whole time we've had it...? Sounds like utter madness, even though I've seen it with my own eyes...!Shadowheart_InParty_DiscussedIntermezzoINT_EmperorRevealed_Event_SceneComplete!VISITEDREGION_BGO_Main_AShadowheart_InParty_DiscussedIntermezzo

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
    • Shadowheart_InParty_DiscussedIntermezzo {d60ec175-550d-43fd-a78f-26e531509362} = False
    checktype Global
    • INT_EmperorRevealed_Event_SceneComplete {2fa4811a-8757-40e7-a0bb-dc7e210dd6e6} = True
    • VISITEDREGION_BGO_Main_A {40f06537-814f-4796-b012-5ffaa648a8d9} = False
    settype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
    • Shadowheart_InParty_DiscussedIntermezzo {d60ec175-550d-43fd-a78f-26e531509362} = True

    Metadata

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: 5294b5f0-a33d-a5f8-b7c3-8e762aed249eSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hf67df6a4gc6e3g4505g98ceg34b6b0af60e9Text UUID: 5dcb7bc3-0070-4c0a-ae24-8466dab42e43Timeline Phase Index: 61Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5294b5f0-a33d-a5f8-b7c3-8e762aed249eTimeline Phase Duration: 21.79sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Root: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex
    • +
      352.ShadowheartIllusion: The more I learn, the less I understand just why I was sent to retrieve that thing... but it matters little now.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9f8ea083-1d1d-9348-dd8e-a68c87b5f9b9Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h88527d2eg4d07g42dagadf5g7c9d769b192dText UUID: c74b3a93-aab0-45c7-8ee1-5f3301b21c10Group ID: 5294b5f0-a33d-a5f8-b7c3-8e762aed249eGroup Index: 1
      • +
        422.ShadowheartIllusion: Lady Shar has given me a new mission - and the Prism plays no part in it. In fact, it seems like the Mother Superior's concern alone, and she has strayed from the Dark Lady.Chosen of Shar

        Flags and Tags

        checktype Tag | speaker 0 ShadowheartIllusion
        • Chosen of Shar {9624a3fe-bb9e-47c5-b9ab-417e6da6f84b} = True

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c063094b-40f9-58a4-d3e3-d6a3ffeae04cSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h88ce01d6g81e6g423cg8018g2ab6ec216a1bText UUID: 66c470e2-9b82-4487-9aaa-a7e7134853bbTimeline Phase Index: 86Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c063094b-40f9-58a4-d3e3-d6a3ffeae04cTimeline Phase Duration: 19.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: c063094b-40f9-58a4-d3e3-d6a3ffeae04cGroup Index: 0
        • +
          55.ShadowheartIllusion: She will be in for a rude awakening when I finally stand before her again...

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 19390190-bb21-3577-929f-70e1e0893d50Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h7fe5bc0cg0761g4df2gb659gca7d03b191deText UUID: 78415613-4fe0-4b87-bbef-808a9fd83709Group ID: c063094b-40f9-58a4-d3e3-d6a3ffeae04cGroup Index: 1
          • +
            451.ShadowheartIllusion: But I digress. Did you want something?

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d03a2286-0279-0534-9fc2-1ed4f3f5597dSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hdcd786d5gf823g4367g8227gc8254d5ac7e8Text UUID: 937fe4ff-d4d8-472e-bd07-880902afb2aaTimeline Phase Index: 98Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d03a2286-0279-0534-9fc2-1ed4f3f5597dTimeline Phase Duration: 4.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
            • •
              525.Jump to Node 213

              Metadata

              Node Type: JumpUUID: f2d5479c-e81d-9778-efca-fd3bf77b85c0Jump Target: Node 213 (5f864b1a-65af-45de-ac29-d27242ab07b7)Jump Target Point: 2
      • +
        203.ShadowheartIllusion: I do not serve Shar anymore. Nor the Mother Superior. The Prism is no longer my mission - saving my parents is.NIGHT_NightsongShadowheartVisitEnemy of Shar

        Flags and Tags

        checktype Global
        • NIGHT_NightsongShadowheartVisit {5cf06d9e-44ce-4431-a1c6-839bfdad5f79} = True
        checktype Tag | speaker 0 ShadowheartIllusion

        338.ShadowheartIllusion: I do not serve Shar anymore. Nor the Mother Superior. The Prism is no longer my mission. Only the Nightsong can tell me what I must do next.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 951919e4-6229-d92a-a8c6-4ed3f22c68b1Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h5286c887g1725g479cg8e14gb347b6736b77Text UUID: e8948cdf-a2b2-46ba-9a03-4b76490bdea4Timeline Phase Index: 137Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 951919e4-6229-d92a-a8c6-4ed3f22c68b1Timeline Phase Duration: 12sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

    12.ShadowheartIllusion: I... I defied Lady Shar. She won't stand for this... we can talk later - I need to get out of here first.!VISITEDREGION_BGO_Main_ASHA_NightsongsFate_State_ShadowheartFailedSharSHA_NightsongPrison_State_NightsongFreed!Enemy of Shar

        240.ShadowheartIllusion: I wished I shared your confidence.

          16.ShadowheartIllusion: They must want that artefact back badly, if they're dispatching red dragons in pursuit of it. But we cannot afford to lose it.

          • +
            141.ShadowheartIllusion: I wish I'd never been sent on this mission. It had better be worth it.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3e2d8507-a2b8-6cf7-a159-13a9757b3b87Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hc14ba891g75d6g47feg842bgab6e9bc25482Text UUID: 694089b4-b395-46d5-8bef-3e9acde2199aGroup ID: 05581c6b-0bf3-bd83-60e1-b1aaaded07baGroup Index: 1
            • +

    160.ShadowheartIllusion: I want to talk to you about the other night. I thought we were having a pleasant time... but you cut it short.
    !Shadowheart_InParty_State_DiscussedAbortedSkinnydippingORI_Shadowheart_State_AbortedSkinnydippingORI_State_PartneredWithShadowheartShadowheart_InParty_State_DiscussedAbortedSkinnydipping

    232.ShadowheartIllusion: We could have gotten up to all sorts of mischief the other night, you and I... had you not fled like a startled cat.!Shadowheart_InParty_State_DiscussedAbortedNightfallORI_Shadowheart_State_AbortedNightfallORI_State_PartneredWithShadowheartShadowheart_InParty_State_DiscussedAbortedNightfall

    344.ShadowheartIllusion: So, you and Minthara, is it? I suppose that little spark we shared has been snuffed out then. I don't blame you though - she is a... compelling prospect.!VISITEDREGION_BGO_Main_AORI_State_Partnered!ORI_State_PartneredWithShadowheartORI_State_DatingShadowheartORI_State_PartneredWithMinthara!ORI_Temp_DatingOrigin

          41.Jump to Node 11

      • +
        403.Player: I want to be with Lae'zel, but I want to be with you also. Need things be so rigid?

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: b6b3461e-1286-4f5e-9442-8ed87a93e67bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5edb52a2g98dfg4cf1g828fg0b6f89060b25Text UUID: 3fe71640-1f0c-4ee9-8bb9-849d7d59c8b8Show Once: True
        • +
          288.ShadowheartIllusion: I'm going to go out on a limb and assume that Lae'zel may not be keen to share you with me.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7ed65f62-336f-42a6-bea8-2d0040d24f26Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hd222698ega4f4g4bd2gbd90ge9aa63af3053Text UUID: aca6d82c-a951-45f1-8e7f-237606f6952aTimeline Phase Index: 108Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7ed65f62-336f-42a6-bea8-2d0040d24f26Timeline Phase Duration: 6.61sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

        548.Player: I want to be with Gale. I'm sorry.!ORI_State_DatingShadowheart

        Flags and Tags

        settype Object | speaker 1 Player
        • ORI_State_DatingShadowheart {e87f1e21-a758-47ae-8c0e-9e715eb289b5} = False

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: fbe628d9-2a00-4538-8d67-815b261432a3Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h4bcb411cg3382g4a7ag9f8ag7450694ea569Text UUID: fe8e4f76-22c6-4454-9933-63ba5e2011abShow Once: True
        • +
          407.ShadowheartIllusion: Don't be. He's charming enough, well-read and well-groomed. You could end up with worse specimens at your side.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b845fe35-85bb-4945-9155-8471041538baSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h24c99127g23d5g4bb0g97abg7b13174b9b09Text UUID: 62720a39-7c81-4374-b1bd-1c9a53262d29Timeline Phase Index: 126Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b845fe35-85bb-4945-9155-8471041538baTimeline Phase Duration: 8.99sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
          • •
            454.Jump to Node 11

            Metadata

            Node Type: JumpUUID: d176f356-81e4-4aa9-a093-898ea7d6f7c2Jump Target: Node 11 (03f1acea-70e7-4f3d-8628-0ff0462d7c88)Jump Target Point: 1
      • +
        243.Player: I have feelings for both you and Gale. Why let monogamy get in our way?

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 6ada2a46-4433-4caf-a488-9b878fbef851Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h87f72810g6fd6g4d28g872ag8cd4d5b5bf84Text UUID: 0720fa99-866c-4b61-96d5-021d05535ee3Show Once: True
        • +
          198.ShadowheartIllusion: Gale has a proud streak - do you truly think he'd want to share? Try wooing you while I lurked in the corner waiting my turn? No. That's not him.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 589b144e-5141-4e35-94c2-fca8a8e312a1Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h186f149eg271fg4fe9g840eg0cae24331855Text UUID: 098aac47-92d3-43e2-9700-5884cf726349Timeline Phase Index: 135Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 589b144e-5141-4e35-94c2-fca8a8e312a1Timeline Phase Duration: 11.7sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

        86.Player: I'm sorry, but I've chosen to be with Wyll.!ORI_State_DatingShadowheart

        Flags and Tags

        settype Object | speaker 1 Player
        • ORI_State_DatingShadowheart {e87f1e21-a758-47ae-8c0e-9e715eb289b5} = False

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 270db685-4666-4bda-aa30-13c3530e70c8Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h94f68824g0b01g4562g8c74g8eddf6444fc1Text UUID: d05d8d1d-3a16-4d49-a612-36dcf5c54267Show Once: True
        • +
          206.ShadowheartIllusion: I can't blame you. Who wouldn't want a hero of the classic mould for a lover - and heir to a noble house, to boot?

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5cd8fb8b-86ff-49b1-ad47-db123b4e05c2Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hebe9dfa5g9071g42c3gabbdg057ff1a3c683Text UUID: fee7d38e-6200-4591-ad19-d5d3ab5cd945Timeline Phase Index: 111Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5cd8fb8b-86ff-49b1-ad47-db123b4e05c2Timeline Phase Duration: 9sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
          • •
            511.Jump to Node 11

            Metadata

            Node Type: JumpUUID: edad8192-cc7a-43b6-9bae-7c64d5067783Jump Target: Node 11 (03f1acea-70e7-4f3d-8628-0ff0462d7c88)Jump Target Point: 1
      • +
        50.Player: Must I choose between you and Wyll? We've travelled together, fought together... perhaps we can love together.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 1655cb96-553b-4e2f-b9ad-df72033b94ffSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h4b033f67gd2f6g4f1dga424g25b4f875c986Text UUID: 25f0eb88-1436-4420-a99e-87cfff1ec79bShow Once: True
        • +
          53.ShadowheartIllusion: Wyll comes from an old, traditional line. I doubt his family would like their heir to introduce them to his lover's lover.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 17b85931-77f9-4323-ba60-d39f9433cbebSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hf3d74e36ge2b6g4ae0g9993g0dcaf7413e21Text UUID: e7994ba0-2ea7-409b-a061-898f269a666fTimeline Phase Index: 85Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 17b85931-77f9-4323-ba60-d39f9433cbebTimeline Phase Duration: 10sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
          • +
            125.ShadowheartIllusion: In truth, I don't think I'd want to be your spare lover. I'd always want more of you than you'd have to spare. Better perhaps to bow out with dignity.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 36f1b9e3-1ecb-4497-8476-8c3297a5b80dSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hd3fd298bgb472g4e8bg8e74gaceeb20de6e1Text UUID: 9b79a5ee-ea52-43c5-9e6c-93cca5728dbfTimeline Phase Index: 97Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 36f1b9e3-1ecb-4497-8476-8c3297a5b80dTimeline Phase Duration: 13.05sTimeline Phase Shots: 3
            • •

        521.Player: I'm sorry, but Karlach has won my heart. !ORI_State_DatingShadowheart

        Flags and Tags

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f03a4c79-ec13-4741-955b-954cd60fe3feSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hb03c18c8g4777g4fbcg9d5cg553ab9707f16Text UUID: 762a06a7-8e5a-4b01-a2ce-37437c360c25Show Once: True
        • +
          291.ShadowheartIllusion: That's one way to put it - careful she doesn't try to steal it to replace her own. But in all seriousness, I'm glad you found someone, even if it isn't me. I hope you make each other happy.

          Text

          That's one way to put it - careful she doesn't try to steal it to replace her own. But in all seriousness, I'm glad you found someone, even if it isn't me. I hope you make each other happy.
          h03ce1a65gb5e6g4115g9e09gced0f5784b6c | 90603e9b-0c67-4aaa-a91d-cd98b06825a4 | stub

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 806ea2a2-bd71-4015-91ab-1efeb84df7d4Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h03ce1a65gb5e6g4115g9e09gced0f5784b6cText UUID: 90603e9b-0c67-4aaa-a91d-cd98b06825a4Timeline Phase Index: 106Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 806ea2a2-bd71-4015-91ab-1efeb84df7d4Timeline Phase Duration: 17.81sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

            549.Jump to Node 11

            Node Type: JumpUUID: fbf54a09-f6b1-4c93-92eb-bc2c4cea559aJump Target: Node 11 (03f1acea-70e7-4f3d-8628-0ff0462d7c88)Jump Target Point: 1
      • +
        297.Player: I'm not a swan - I don't mate for life. I want to be with you and Karlach.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 8400fd13-ed83-4ede-9773-2f944c846762Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hd509e939g7445g4f52gabf3g3c90b97b7559Text UUID: 08256e9a-fd7d-4612-b970-662665a6f3d3Show Once: True
        • +
          201.ShadowheartIllusion: I admire your ambition - and your belief in your own stamina - but Karlach deserves to have you to herself. And perhaps there's yet someone out there for me...

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5aeb9ec2-97f0-4cad-8698-dd1aad94da3fSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h7db29207gd2eeg46d5g8441g7e09ff031357Text UUID: f52187d0-b537-4e3f-8731-04b135e9a31eTimeline Phase Index: 105Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5aeb9ec2-97f0-4cad-8698-dd1aad94da3fTimeline Phase Duration: 13.84sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 4894a7f5-25b4-4d9e-ab08-e04ab94785fdSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: he20ae49eg8c35g4671gaee8gdd34c6f6b2dbText UUID: 1df7c687-5ac3-49e5-ad39-83210ea146e6Show Once: True
        • +
          235.ShadowheartIllusion: I suppose I can't really blame you - Astarion has a knack for making people swoon even while the blood's still in their veins. I hope you two find your version of happiness together.

          Text

          I suppose I can't really blame you - Astarion has a knack for making people swoon even while the blood's still in their veins. I hope you two find your version of happiness together.
          h9449057fgb4f3g4630ga767g79f78dfa5336 | 261e57b4-f5d8-4852-81e2-093825187933 | stub

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 669b706e-bf58-4cd8-bd7f-0d2a94fc47f6Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h9449057fgb4f3g4630ga767g79f78dfa5336Text UUID: 261e57b4-f5d8-4852-81e2-093825187933Timeline Phase Index: 118Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 669b706e-bf58-4cd8-bd7f-0d2a94fc47f6Timeline Phase Duration: 12sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
          • •
            11.ShadowheartIllusion: And don't worry about me - I'll manage, one way or another. But I'll remember our little moments together fondly - they're amongst the few good memories I can lay claim to. [End]

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 03f1acea-70e7-4f3d-8628-0ff0462d7c88Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h2be04f49ga18dg4007gad91gdf626fea1a86Text UUID: d3a12920-0cde-4f65-af47-239df4203a41Timeline Phase Index: 147Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 03f1acea-70e7-4f3d-8628-0ff0462d7c88Timeline Phase Duration: 15.83sTimeline Phase Shots: 2End Node: True
      • +
        100.Player: I've fallen for Astarion, but I want to be with you as well. Why limit ourselves?

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 2bd1702a-743b-44d9-a26a-38108a09f08aSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h75ffcd4eg5563g4cbbgb974gc3313128835dText UUID: 0b84a957-812e-4423-9260-16d5dcd637ecShow Once: True
        • +
          353.ShadowheartIllusion: I think you may be overestimating his willingness to share - he may seem like the carefree hedonist, but there's something fragile beneath the facade.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9fc237a2-1840-4a4b-81b4-b49380b74c30Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h25a0947dge87fg4975g9178gf8ef6add66c0Text UUID: 16a570b5-83c3-49ac-9e57-f33369aad854Timeline Phase Index: 131Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9fc237a2-1840-4a4b-81b4-b49380b74c30Timeline Phase Duration: 29.6sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 9fc237a2-1840-4a4b-81b4-b49380b74c30Group Index: 0
          • +
            493.ShadowheartIllusion: If you can give him the solace that I'm convinced he desperately needs, then it would just be cruel for me to try and elbow in - liable to end in tears, or blood, or both.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e3193d99-1f72-4abe-b3d5-6c2ba88179c2Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hb2eeaf13gcacdg4af3g9e0eg871137be73e4Text UUID: a1190953-ea1a-4f0b-afcb-99cb21b990bfGroup ID: 9fc237a2-1840-4a4b-81b4-b49380b74c30Group Index: 1
            • +
              435.ShadowheartIllusion: There's no hard feelings - genuinely. You deserve happiness, and I'm more than glad to remain with you to bear witness to it.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c51f4dcc-02af-49aa-adc1-c1133d900e27Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hb2ee4ec2g2cf0g456bg839eg0d5fa0a9083aText UUID: 05b85c6d-f706-4e93-b697-37fe3879715fTimeline Phase Index: 103Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c51f4dcc-02af-49aa-adc1-c1133d900e27Timeline Phase Duration: 13sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
              • +
                259.Player: I am sorry, for what it's worth. You're sure you don't hate me?!ORI_State_DatingShadowheart

                Flags and Tags

                settype Object | speaker 1 Player
                • ORI_State_DatingShadowheart {e87f1e21-a758-47ae-8c0e-9e715eb289b5} = False

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 70565240-fbde-4c60-9ed5-b4377b9abf44Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h041c0d60gd4e7g4309ga7eag8e8d1f0cfc2cText UUID: 5b5f7fa3-2210-44ae-9af2-d56df2de67edShow Once: True
                • •
                  522.ShadowheartIllusion: Don't be foolish - you're far too handsome to hate. [End]MaleFemale

                  Flags and Tags

                  ruletagtype rule
                  • Male {8f74d144-041e-4035-a9ac-72f41fc32de7}
                  • Female {3806477c-65a7-4100-9f92-be4c12c4fa4f}

                  Variant 1

                  combine=0

                  Variant 3

                  Don't be foolish - you're far too easy on the eyes to hate.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f12bb1b3-1fb0-4850-8798-cb0282dcfbd7Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text 1 Handle: h23fba99cgbd35g4e45ga9fag495faa4917e7Text 1 UUID: 1e0f1938-99db-4cd1-bc1a-5a24a36c49afText 2 Handle: h384a46a1gfdd3g446ag8406g3306684c441aText 2 UUID: 60d6ccfa-301d-4718-a708-89d2f6741986Text 3 Handle: hbc8382e3g8ecbg43c9g8aa7g68b81cc9b789Text 3 UUID: 6db68004-8a77-4ce1-a800-2b81dff9c993Timeline 1 Phase Index: 145Timeline 1 Dialog Node UUID: f12bb1b3-1fb0-4850-8798-cb0282dcfbd7Timeline 1 Phase Duration: 5.46sTimeline 1 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 2 Phase Index: 146Timeline 2 Dialog Node UUID: f12bb1b3-1fb0-4850-8798-cb0282dcfbd7Timeline 2 Phase Duration: 5.86sTimeline 2 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 3 Phase Index: 149Timeline 3 Dialog Node UUID: f12bb1b3-1fb0-4850-8798-cb0282dcfbd7Timeline 3 Phase Duration: 5.69sTimeline 3 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 4 Phase Index: 163Timeline 4 Dialog Node UUID: f12bb1b3-1fb0-4850-8798-cb0282dcfbd7Timeline 4 Phase Duration: 5sTimeline 4 Phase Shots: 1End Node: True
              • +
                307.Player: I'm glad to have you as a friend.!ORI_State_DatingShadowheart

                Flags and Tags

                settype Object | speaker 1 Player
                • ORI_State_DatingShadowheart {e87f1e21-a758-47ae-8c0e-9e715eb289b5} = False

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 8760e100-b75e-402e-ba94-c1c5bbc71befSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h4d04450cgf90bg4bc2g8d33g02b11323aa55Text UUID: edfb40ee-f812-418d-abc5-86279080d0bbShow Once: True
                • •
                  531.ShadowheartIllusion: The feeling is mutual. I mean it. [End]

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f5da1ad5-78a8-44ec-b58f-ce9e5d678cefSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hcff20fdag1c9eg429fg9e34g2fc8ee50224aText UUID: f1d797d3-29f6-4ef3-82cc-c04f597b1ea4Timeline Phase Index: 164Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f5da1ad5-78a8-44ec-b58f-ce9e5d678cefTimeline Phase Duration: 4.18sTimeline Phase Shots: 2End Node: True
      • +
        114.Player: I didn't realise you felt that way about me.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 326db0ed-8a19-4297-8400-ace4a0d85b56Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h26fb7e8agd0edg4c20gadb3g9c360e2de76cText UUID: 94cca837-b681-4eca-8064-03becba5052bShow Once: True
        • +
          66.ShadowheartIllusion: Sometimes it can be difficult to know what you want - what you need - until it's already lost to you. I know that from experience.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1cf81961-bcd0-4f0a-9bd4-43582f51dfb6Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h36920529g89f1g4324gb9c4g17e17a51f66bText UUID: 1c55674c-d4b3-46d7-b1b2-f3b4f5597ff4Timeline Phase Index: 94Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1cf81961-bcd0-4f0a-9bd4-43582f51dfb6Timeline Phase Duration: 27.7sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 1cf81961-bcd0-4f0a-9bd4-43582f51dfb6Group Index: 0
          • +
            25.ShadowheartIllusion: I won't lie. I won't pretend that part of me isn't hoping you'll look in my eyes and still feel something.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0a94e1a0-e316-42b0-be41-669d4bd92b02Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hc11284d1g697eg46fbgba6eg05cbe3c6d4faText UUID: 8f43089c-b9ce-4d64-96d1-46a83628d42fGroup ID: 1cf81961-bcd0-4f0a-9bd4-43582f51dfb6Group Index: 1
            • +
              373.ShadowheartIllusion: Foolish, I know. But allow me to wallow in the fantasy a moment, bittersweet as it is.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a9b92b6e-f65e-4d81-9fd1-4e0199b2a14bSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hfc2c25f5gc196g48b8ga6aag421821b13ebaText UUID: 71e4fddc-6199-42de-a7c7-8897cdefd44eGroup ID: 1cf81961-bcd0-4f0a-9bd4-43582f51dfb6Group Index: 2
              • +
                84.Player: Wait. This is wrong. You're the one I'm supposed to be with. I see that now.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 26caf0ba-6d6a-4877-b21b-744e523d1b43Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hdb92785aga347g49bagbed7g9da9042ead19Text UUID: 6dc11362-58b8-4f11-92fe-ef4825068274Show Once: True
                • +
                  463.ShadowheartIllusion: But what about Lae'zel? Are you truly willing to risk her ire just to be with me?ORI_State_PartneredWithLaezel

                  Flags and Tags

                  302.ShadowheartIllusion: Well that's one way to end things. [End]

                  Metadata

    Text

    Variant 1

    combine=0
    • Chosen of Shar
    You know, we had the beginnings of something special once... but it was not meant to be, I suppose. For the best perhaps - I have to dedicate myself to Lady Shar now.
    heae7d7c8g5ca4g488cg81d0g353e0bb51e81 | 18b5329a-5a35-4b08-a7c7-ba909fd65850 | stub

    Variant 2

    You know, we had the beginnings of something special once... but it was not meant to be, I suppose. Perhaps happiness lies elsewhere, for both of us.
    h07ead16bg9785g4e6cga87egb482f54481b2 | 4c9ce79d-d880-419b-bb85-2a71f2dec23f | stub

      325.ShadowheartIllusion: I heard you and Astarion. For a while I thought you were a little more subtle in your tastes, but I suppose not. Enjoy your pallid confection, I suppose.ORI_State_DatingAstarion

      • +
        410.Player: I didn't mean what I said - it's you I want.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: b9fc8167-25da-46c3-a2c2-cd3ad32768e2Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h4670b09agadaag4003gab9dge4fd408ea685Text UUID: fc34cbb9-81bb-4e91-9df7-d82fc1f9dffdShow Once: True
        • +
          528.ShadowheartIllusion: Oh don't be like that - you've made your bed, now go roll around in it with your new beau.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f44c4d40-a434-410e-a13a-7df6ef6d3e7eSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h45bb0963g86ccg4633gb227gb944064b9b0dText UUID: 638dbd55-1d5a-49d4-ba38-b4e4fb7b9858Timeline Phase Index: 71Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f44c4d40-a434-410e-a13a-7df6ef6d3e7eTimeline Phase Duration: 7sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
          • •
            46.ShadowheartIllusion: Though for a while, I thought I might have someone to share new memories with. Not to be, it seems... [End]

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 155b16e4-7c63-443c-97cd-e1405990f344Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h78acffbfgbaa2g4fd9g8f1bgfd0fa7ef98f4Text UUID: f3d5c455-8783-4a85-86a8-3f573bd0449eTimeline Phase Index: 171Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 155b16e4-7c63-443c-97cd-e1405990f344Timeline Phase Duration: 8.6sTimeline Phase Shots: 3End Node: True
      • +
        329.Player: What we had was... casual.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 8f08c24c-6bf1-49b5-a4a8-b655d83dd8f8Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h8925b218ge6dcg4ee8ga0c6g491f3b2887b0Text UUID: a4965d1a-12fe-4ece-8325-1121b3357074Show Once: True
        • +
          140.ShadowheartIllusion: I suppose it was. And don't worry - I'm not going to toss your belongings into the campfire or anything.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3d9ed207-8d4b-4f6d-8e23-e4bb4ef1b22fSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h11cbe8fcg20cdg498bgb7cbg47060b5530a6Text UUID: c4d47b61-82fe-4b52-8ba6-828c64245166Timeline Phase Index: 82Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3d9ed207-8d4b-4f6d-8e23-e4bb4ef1b22fTimeline Phase Duration: 8.31sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
          • See Node 46 (ShadowheartIllusion) Though for a while, I thought I might have someone to share new memories with. Not to be, it seems...
      • +
        512.Player: I'm sorry. I can't help how I feel.

        • +

    • +
      388.ShadowheartIllusion: I was convinced Lae'zel was had settled on you as her conquest. Brave of you to deny her.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b2e05bd3-4120-4cea-a827-94b4b933aa1fSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h51318c9cg7104g435aga91fg900fba2e91c1Text UUID: 143843ca-c77d-469a-8df8-34041b486451Timeline Phase Index: 130Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b2e05bd3-4120-4cea-a827-94b4b933aa1fTimeline Phase Duration: 7.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
      • See Node 70 (ShadowheartIllusion) Are you sure you're not making a mistake? Seems your heart is a hotly-contested prize, and I'm just... well, me.
  • -

    33.ShadowheartIllusion: You're a sight for sore eyes, even now. Did you want something?Approval_AtLeast_40_For_Sp2ORI_State_WasPartneredWithShadowheart

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Object | speaker 0 ShadowheartIllusion
    • Approval_AtLeast_40_For_Sp2 {cb50595f-b514-26a8-0c90-fbb21185b22e} = True
    checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
    • ORI_State_WasPartneredWithShadowheart {542e6cf4-bfd1-471d-b4b5-693d630376cb} = True

    Text

    You're a sight for sore eyes, even now. Did you want something?
    h5a56e4d5g0b75g4550g846dg0285c6b2319f | 614a8076-0eeb-4e04-a0ab-19a76fa922fa | stub
    What can I do for you?
    h1c8cfbefg2228g4459g8599g716a389f1b83 | 6df655e4-b9ad-4b0d-9278-9d78ea83223c | stub
    You know, I didn't realise it was possible to be so cordial with a former flame. I suppose I'm lucky. Did you want something?
    h9b86fa4ag3ebag4e34g874bgdf9999e20885 | 47dbac6f-a323-4806-ac0f-f1a5ccc0990c | stub
    Careful - keep seeking me out like this and people may think we're rekindling things. Did you want something?
    h80705cd1ge3f6g449bgabe8g3e40c637e675 | d2338cb1-c295-4dad-b9e9-a700ce3b4626 | stub

    Metadata

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: 0d1ba1b6-eb42-edd9-d615-0a01b50d9712Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text 1 Handle: h5a56e4d5g0b75g4550g846dg0285c6b2319fText 1 UUID: 614a8076-0eeb-4e04-a0ab-19a76fa922faText 2 Handle: h1c8cfbefg2228g4459g8599g716a389f1b83Text 2 UUID: 6df655e4-b9ad-4b0d-9278-9d78ea83223cText 3 Handle: h9b86fa4ag3ebag4e34g874bgdf9999e20885Text 3 UUID: 47dbac6f-a323-4806-ac0f-f1a5ccc0990cText 4 Handle: h80705cd1ge3f6g449bgabe8g3e40c637e675Text 4 UUID: d2338cb1-c295-4dad-b9e9-a700ce3b4626Timeline 1 Phase Index: 4Timeline 1 Dialog Node UUID: 0d1ba1b6-eb42-edd9-d615-0a01b50d9712Timeline 1 Phase Duration: 8.29sTimeline 1 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 2 Phase Index: 5Timeline 2 Dialog Node UUID: 0d1ba1b6-eb42-edd9-d615-0a01b50d9712Timeline 2 Phase Duration: 9.3sTimeline 2 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 3 Phase Index: 6Timeline 3 Dialog Node UUID: 0d1ba1b6-eb42-edd9-d615-0a01b50d9712Timeline 3 Phase Duration: 1.68sTimeline 3 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 4 Phase Index: 7Timeline 4 Dialog Node UUID: 0d1ba1b6-eb42-edd9-d615-0a01b50d9712Timeline 4 Phase Duration: 4.81sTimeline 4 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 5 Phase Index: 57Timeline 5 Dialog Node UUID: 0d1ba1b6-eb42-edd9-d615-0a01b50d9712Timeline 5 Phase Duration: 8.23sTimeline 5 Phase Shots: 1Root: True

    510.ShadowheartIllusion: You know, I truly do marvel sometimes that I ever had feelings for you. What do you want?ORI_State_WasPartneredWithShadowheart

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
    • ORI_State_WasPartneredWithShadowheart {542e6cf4-bfd1-471d-b4b5-693d630376cb} = True

    Text

    You know, I truly do marvel sometimes that I ever had feelings for you. What do you want?
    h93427cf2g322eg4cf4gb984g17ee6be5db4f | a60fcd89-7b44-4e12-be41-fe4fc71ca93c | stub
    Mmm-hmm? This had better be important.
    h8814be2dgbc6cg4a59g8d2eg49fcf2f63fd8 | 4b97bc6f-3dec-49eb-9cf9-971df4272899 | stub
    Honestly, I should be grateful that you ended things between us - I dodged a poison-tipped arrow there. What do you want?
    h3defb98cg9b51g4fc9g8772g7b6eca4b14c3 | be01960d-9358-4cf2-8903-6dd46e98614b | stub
    Spit it out then.
    hc8b17cb6g2206g4e78gaeefg87196982d012 | faa92f39-c0cd-4175-8751-4f0509692659 | stub
    I'm listening - though don't ask me why.
    hab33a4acgc696g4d8bgb9a7g3b67cba7eab2 | 134d6bdd-5ea5-4148-a836-5ec53f7a068f | stub

    Metadata

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: ed48a36e-ef82-d2a5-d385-e61b30c03511Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text 1 Handle: h93427cf2g322eg4cf4gb984g17ee6be5db4fText 1 UUID: a60fcd89-7b44-4e12-be41-fe4fc71ca93cText 2 Handle: h8814be2dgbc6cg4a59g8d2eg49fcf2f63fd8Text 2 UUID: 4b97bc6f-3dec-49eb-9cf9-971df4272899Text 3 Handle: h3defb98cg9b51g4fc9g8772g7b6eca4b14c3Text 3 UUID: be01960d-9358-4cf2-8903-6dd46e98614bText 4 Handle: hc8b17cb6g2206g4e78gaeefg87196982d012Text 4 UUID: faa92f39-c0cd-4175-8751-4f0509692659Text 5 Handle: hab33a4acgc696g4d8bgb9a7g3b67cba7eab2Text 5 UUID: 134d6bdd-5ea5-4148-a836-5ec53f7a068fTimeline 1 Phase Index: 9Timeline 1 Dialog Node UUID: ed48a36e-ef82-d2a5-d385-e61b30c03511Timeline 1 Phase Duration: 7.35sTimeline 1 Phase Shots: 1Timeline 2 Phase Index: 30Timeline 2 Dialog Node UUID: ed48a36e-ef82-d2a5-d385-e61b30c03511Timeline 2 Phase Duration: 3.25sTimeline 2 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 3 Phase Index: 31Timeline 3 Dialog Node UUID: ed48a36e-ef82-d2a5-d385-e61b30c03511Timeline 3 Phase Duration: 1.86sTimeline 3 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 4 Phase Index: 32Timeline 4 Dialog Node UUID: ed48a36e-ef82-d2a5-d385-e61b30c03511Timeline 4 Phase Duration: 7.8sTimeline 4 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 5 Phase Index: 33Timeline 5 Dialog Node UUID: ed48a36e-ef82-d2a5-d385-e61b30c03511Timeline 5 Phase Duration: 3.75sTimeline 5 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 6 Phase Index: 34Timeline 6 Dialog Node UUID: ed48a36e-ef82-d2a5-d385-e61b30c03511Timeline 6 Phase Duration: 7.79sTimeline 6 Phase Shots: 2Root: True

    173.ShadowheartIllusion: Aren't you a sight for sore eyes.Approval_AtLeast_40_For_Sp2ORI_State_PartneredWithShadowheart

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Object | speaker 0 ShadowheartIllusion
    • Approval_AtLeast_40_For_Sp2 {cb50595f-b514-26a8-0c90-fbb21185b22e} = True
    checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
    • ORI_State_PartneredWithShadowheart {3808ae35-ad4e-465b-800b-63d32b77211e} = True

    Text

    Aren't you a sight for sore eyes.
    h58a61da8g7b5ag4f8agbac5g354f62512e77 | 30bfa89f-4b8b-490a-a095-7f0fd9ca7f87 | stub
    Did you want something? If not, I'm perfectly happy to just gaze upon you a while.
    ha2c23788g2acdg4d58gabe0g0caffdc54064 | d54c74ae-09a3-4c54-9adf-51742ae4f2fb | stub
    Why hello, lover... that sounded more debonaire in my head, I'll admit. Do you need something?
    h089930fdg3555g4822gae62g09abc9d6fee2 | 9205b468-b58d-4541-bf05-ca7d570ad4db | stub
    Good. I was just starting to miss the sound of your voice.
    h0633cd9bg74dfg4126g9e4fg65ca5667b814 | 747c06f6-bc88-4a81-9b00-cb719d459f23 | stub

    Metadata

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: 4c2f28c3-4a1b-370a-73f8-d2bfcea53e9dSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text 1 Handle: h58a61da8g7b5ag4f8agbac5g354f62512e77Text 1 UUID: 30bfa89f-4b8b-490a-a095-7f0fd9ca7f87Text 2 Handle: ha2c23788g2acdg4d58gabe0g0caffdc54064Text 2 UUID: d54c74ae-09a3-4c54-9adf-51742ae4f2fbText 3 Handle: h089930fdg3555g4822gae62g09abc9d6fee2Text 3 UUID: 9205b468-b58d-4541-bf05-ca7d570ad4dbText 4 Handle: h0633cd9bg74dfg4126g9e4fg65ca5667b814Text 4 UUID: 747c06f6-bc88-4a81-9b00-cb719d459f23Timeline 1 Phase Index: 43Timeline 1 Dialog Node UUID: 4c2f28c3-4a1b-370a-73f8-d2bfcea53e9dTimeline 1 Phase Duration: 5.36sTimeline 1 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 2 Phase Index: 44Timeline 2 Dialog Node UUID: 4c2f28c3-4a1b-370a-73f8-d2bfcea53e9dTimeline 2 Phase Duration: 8.1sTimeline 2 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 3 Phase Index: 45Timeline 3 Dialog Node UUID: 4c2f28c3-4a1b-370a-73f8-d2bfcea53e9dTimeline 3 Phase Duration: 8sTimeline 3 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 4 Phase Index: 46Timeline 4 Dialog Node UUID: 4c2f28c3-4a1b-370a-73f8-d2bfcea53e9dTimeline 4 Phase Duration: 2.59sTimeline 4 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 5 Phase Index: 63Timeline 5 Dialog Node UUID: 4c2f28c3-4a1b-370a-73f8-d2bfcea53e9dTimeline 5 Phase Duration: 7.6sTimeline 5 Phase Shots: 1Root: True

    367.ShadowheartIllusion: I hope this is important.
    ORI_State_PartneredWithShadowheart

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
    • ORI_State_PartneredWithShadowheart {3808ae35-ad4e-465b-800b-63d32b77211e} = True

    Text

    I hope this is important.
    hffc1fc75ge617g4e2eg8671gfcec160b286f | a73846ad-486e-4734-8c32-f19e07d3231a | stub
    You know what I really love about you? When you play the strong, silent type. Let's keep this short, shall we?

    hfe7300bfg199fg41f5gb73eg531e43e644e0 | 6e787c09-cf0a-45ba-b71b-68b61228ae7d | stub
    You know, just because I join you at your bedroll from time to time doesn't mean you need to talk to me quite so much. Is this urgent?
    hec4dad01gc8b2g4d6fg8cadg71e7e71f6e2a | fd4c0f29-6a41-46e0-a6ae-385bb0dd35e3 | stub
    Personality isn't everything, I suppose. Plenty of relationships can limp along on physical attraction alone. What do you want?
    he1a321b6g73c0g47b6ga4edgd81056ad412e | 09ec24b9-6a48-4b90-b978-4e033376a166 | stub
    Yes?
    ha22ea2afg3072g428ag91e7g1576159fc313 | 289637d4-8646-41ff-ba10-9d23f60e0067 | stub

    Metadata

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: a681f368-a38b-91e1-fe7d-1f187ba9053fSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text 1 Handle: hffc1fc75ge617g4e2eg8671gfcec160b286fText 1 UUID: a73846ad-486e-4734-8c32-f19e07d3231aText 2 Handle: hfe7300bfg199fg41f5gb73eg531e43e644e0Text 2 UUID: 6e787c09-cf0a-45ba-b71b-68b61228ae7dText 3 Handle: hec4dad01gc8b2g4d6fg8cadg71e7e71f6e2aText 3 UUID: fd4c0f29-6a41-46e0-a6ae-385bb0dd35e3Text 4 Handle: he1a321b6g73c0g47b6ga4edgd81056ad412eText 4 UUID: 09ec24b9-6a48-4b90-b978-4e033376a166Text 5 Handle: ha22ea2afg3072g428ag91e7g1576159fc313Text 5 UUID: 289637d4-8646-41ff-ba10-9d23f60e0067Timeline 1 Phase Index: 16Timeline 1 Dialog Node UUID: a681f368-a38b-91e1-fe7d-1f187ba9053fTimeline 1 Phase Duration: 10.13sTimeline 1 Phase Shots: 1Timeline 2 Phase Index: 35Timeline 2 Dialog Node UUID: a681f368-a38b-91e1-fe7d-1f187ba9053fTimeline 2 Phase Duration: 1.6sTimeline 2 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 3 Phase Index: 36Timeline 3 Dialog Node UUID: a681f368-a38b-91e1-fe7d-1f187ba9053fTimeline 3 Phase Duration: 10.5sTimeline 3 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 4 Phase Index: 37Timeline 4 Dialog Node UUID: a681f368-a38b-91e1-fe7d-1f187ba9053fTimeline 4 Phase Duration: 9.99sTimeline 4 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 5 Phase Index: 38Timeline 5 Dialog Node UUID: a681f368-a38b-91e1-fe7d-1f187ba9053fTimeline 5 Phase Duration: 10.7sTimeline 5 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 6 Phase Index: 39Timeline 6 Dialog Node UUID: a681f368-a38b-91e1-fe7d-1f187ba9053fTimeline 6 Phase Duration: 3.14sTimeline 6 Phase Shots: 2Root: True

    161.ShadowheartIllusion: Ah - so that's what people mean when they talk about butterflies in their stomach. Did you want something?
    ORI_State_DatingShadowheartApproval_AtLeast_20_For_Sp2

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
    • ORI_State_DatingShadowheart {e87f1e21-a758-47ae-8c0e-9e715eb289b5} = True
    checktype Object | speaker 0 ShadowheartIllusion
    • Approval_AtLeast_20_For_Sp2 {91cfff92-fb1e-caf5-9d5c-9c5971b96d04} = True

    Text

    Ah - so that's what people mean when they talk about butterflies in their stomach. Did you want something?
    h2f124514g7e1dg4f3aga611g7c5ef36b46d0 | 98528686-01e6-4669-a5ba-270f18ad089c | stub
    You know, I've been catching myself smiling more lately. I think that's your fault.

    h75f78bd0gbc57g43b8ga3d3ge6454ea1d5f2 | 163af8bf-0b4d-483f-af07-a6f9e56b8358 | stub
    I was hoping you'd come to chat. What do you need?
    h6fd3f2e7g95c8g4701g9451g32692e66f31f | 7d62998b-3b70-460b-b066-9d09527ebd2b | stub
    Well, my day just improved. Did you want something?
    he77a084egbd52g4883gbd7dgc21174042f4a | 83daa741-dcd5-4753-ae4f-0a0fab78c9d0 | stub

    Metadata

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: 4609efd6-77c2-5747-edb1-aba5be393a4aSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text 1 Handle: h2f124514g7e1dg4f3aga611g7c5ef36b46d0Text 1 UUID: 98528686-01e6-4669-a5ba-270f18ad089cText 2 Handle: h75f78bd0gbc57g43b8ga3d3ge6454ea1d5f2Text 2 UUID: 163af8bf-0b4d-483f-af07-a6f9e56b8358Text 3 Handle: h6fd3f2e7g95c8g4701g9451g32692e66f31fText 3 UUID: 7d62998b-3b70-460b-b066-9d09527ebd2bText 4 Handle: he77a084egbd52g4883gbd7dgc21174042f4aText 4 UUID: 83daa741-dcd5-4753-ae4f-0a0fab78c9d0Timeline 1 Phase Index: 47Timeline 1 Dialog Node UUID: 4609efd6-77c2-5747-edb1-aba5be393a4aTimeline 1 Phase Duration: 4sTimeline 1 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 2 Phase Index: 48Timeline 2 Dialog Node UUID: 4609efd6-77c2-5747-edb1-aba5be393a4aTimeline 2 Phase Duration: 3.8sTimeline 2 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 3 Phase Index: 49Timeline 3 Dialog Node UUID: 4609efd6-77c2-5747-edb1-aba5be393a4aTimeline 3 Phase Duration: 6.91sTimeline 3 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 4 Phase Index: 50Timeline 4 Dialog Node UUID: 4609efd6-77c2-5747-edb1-aba5be393a4aTimeline 4 Phase Duration: 10.04sTimeline 4 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 5 Phase Index: 64Timeline 5 Dialog Node UUID: 4609efd6-77c2-5747-edb1-aba5be393a4aTimeline 5 Phase Duration: 9.69sTimeline 5 Phase Shots: 1Root: True

            88.ShadowheartIllusion: You mind yourself out there, understand? I'll be here when you need me. [End]ORI_State_PartneredWithShadowheartCAMP_GLO_State_InCamp

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
            • ORI_State_PartneredWithShadowheart {3808ae35-ad4e-465b-800b-63d32b77211e} = True
            checktype Object | speaker 0 ShadowheartIllusion
            • CAMP_GLO_State_InCamp {161b7223-039d-4ebe-986f-1dcd9a66733f} = True

            Text

            You mind yourself out there, understand? I'll be here when you need me.
            h8c848104gfacfg4d98g89d0g652051515e5c | fa3da9b3-0630-408f-999c-54a193250090 | stub
            All right. Be good out there - and if you can't be good, well... don't get caught. I'll be here whenever you need me.
            h430dac13g0c56g40f3g9829gf764f5d78c38 | fcfbafb9-a40d-4ba9-89b6-90ae9eec133e | stub
            Take care. I'll keep an eye on this place.
            had39a9bcg27b1g4c9cga3e3g56fa8685dd3b | 662097d3-3919-48c6-a03d-3aa448074490 | stub

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 276891a3-b88e-8e58-9c9d-07576b9f1144Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text 1 Handle: h8c848104gfacfg4d98g89d0g652051515e5cText 1 UUID: fa3da9b3-0630-408f-999c-54a193250090Text 2 Handle: h430dac13g0c56g40f3g9829gf764f5d78c38Text 2 UUID: fcfbafb9-a40d-4ba9-89b6-90ae9eec133eText 3 Handle: had39a9bcg27b1g4c9cga3e3g56fa8685dd3bText 3 UUID: 662097d3-3919-48c6-a03d-3aa448074490Timeline 1 Phase Index: 165Timeline 1 Dialog Node UUID: 276891a3-b88e-8e58-9c9d-07576b9f1144Timeline 1 Phase Duration: 12.05sTimeline 1 Phase Shots: 1Timeline 2 Phase Index: 166Timeline 2 Dialog Node UUID: 276891a3-b88e-8e58-9c9d-07576b9f1144Timeline 2 Phase Duration: 3.65sTimeline 2 Phase Shots: 1Timeline 3 Phase Index: 167Timeline 3 Dialog Node UUID: 276891a3-b88e-8e58-9c9d-07576b9f1144Timeline 3 Phase Duration: 5.18sTimeline 3 Phase Shots: 1End Node: True

            495.ShadowheartIllusion: Very well. I do like it here, truth be told; my own little corner, time to think... but I'll be ready when you need me. Take care. [End]Approval_AtLeast_30_For_Sp2CAMP_GLO_State_InCamp

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Object | speaker 0 ShadowheartIllusion
            • Approval_AtLeast_30_For_Sp2 {98ca7185-0f2d-4420-be81-2b7c5e109e91} = True
            • CAMP_GLO_State_InCamp {161b7223-039d-4ebe-986f-1dcd9a66733f} = True

            Text

            Very well. I do like it here, truth be told; my own little corner, time to think... but I'll be ready when you need me. Take care.
            had8ee213gca70g4080ga1a2g43a4fe660ea1 | 6dcdd429-c1ed-4a8f-8423-6d53f134f6e4 | stub
            Of course, I'll see you in the evenings. Stay safe out there.
            h28d71a83g6dfag47f3gadfbg7828bd366d12 | c59d0d40-97ff-477f-b2da-43c6a50a2a3a | stub
            Take care - I'll be here when you need me.

            301.ShadowheartIllusion: As you like. You behave yourself out there, and come back to me in one piece. [End]ORI_State_PartneredWithShadowheart

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
            • ORI_State_PartneredWithShadowheart {3808ae35-ad4e-465b-800b-63d32b77211e} = True

            Text

            As you like. You behave yourself out there, and come back to me in one piece.
            h51a40328g2703g40deg839dg5407eac510b0 | 4dbee755-ebb9-46d6-a4ea-ce37d231858b | stub
            Very well. Take care of yourself out there. I'll be waiting for you.
            h8d43132dg40a0g4559g9c29gbba086144499 | 97eba145-d2d2-4061-825d-8abfd720dcb6 | stub
            I suppose a some idle time at camp might do me good - as long as I still see you, come nightfall. Take care.
            h495d4f38g255cg4cd1g8782g8e30ba5e9519 | 97bd954b-1f6c-470b-9a68-fc04d230c8f5 | stub

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 851bc647-7551-8a23-6857-d927161bdda8Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text 1 Handle: h51a40328g2703g40deg839dg5407eac510b0Text 1 UUID: 4dbee755-ebb9-46d6-a4ea-ce37d231858bText 2 Handle: h8d43132dg40a0g4559g9c29gbba086144499Text 2 UUID: 97eba145-d2d2-4061-825d-8abfd720dcb6Text 3 Handle: h495d4f38g255cg4cd1g8782g8e30ba5e9519Text 3 UUID: 97bd954b-1f6c-470b-9a68-fc04d230c8f5Timeline 1 Phase Index: 151Timeline 1 Dialog Node UUID: 851bc647-7551-8a23-6857-d927161bdda8Timeline 1 Phase Duration: 11.13sTimeline 1 Phase Shots: 1Timeline 2 Phase Index: 154Timeline 2 Dialog Node UUID: 851bc647-7551-8a23-6857-d927161bdda8Timeline 2 Phase Duration: 5.89sTimeline 2 Phase Shots: 1Timeline 3 Phase Index: 170Timeline 3 Dialog Node UUID: 851bc647-7551-8a23-6857-d927161bdda8Timeline 3 Phase Duration: 6.48sTimeline 3 Phase Shots: 1End Node: True
          • •
            458.ShadowheartIllusion: Well you know best. I'll be ready whenever you need me. Take care of yourself out there. [End]Approval_AtLeast_30_For_Sp2

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Object | speaker 0 ShadowheartIllusion
            • Approval_AtLeast_30_For_Sp2 {98ca7185-0f2d-4420-be81-2b7c5e109e91} = True

            Text

            Well you know best. I'll be ready whenever you need me. Take care of yourself out there.
            hf46326deg39d6g4393ga9bcgb25e9e1bff5d | 1f21987f-9aab-4526-9c09-4dee89645619 | stub
            I suppose a little 'me time' at camp wouldn't go amiss. Fetch me whenever you need me - and mind yourself out there.
            h9e810175g8c6dg42d8g8f1ag7e009c9be64e | 58d22e78-7413-48a2-be87-3d1591352c80 | stub
            I'll see you at camp then. Be safe - I'm not sure how we'd manage without you.
            hf7cd7289gf93cg43c7ga6a3g63bd6a73e113 | 547fabd2-05ae-43ee-87be-a7cfc9482956 | stub

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d4a79c8b-cf2b-43e6-45f3-cbb1668f73a7Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text 1 Handle: hf46326deg39d6g4393ga9bcgb25e9e1bff5dText 1 UUID: 1f21987f-9aab-4526-9c09-4dee89645619Text 2 Handle: h9e810175g8c6dg42d8g8f1ag7e009c9be64eText 2 UUID: 58d22e78-7413-48a2-be87-3d1591352c80Text 3 Handle: hf7cd7289gf93cg43c7ga6a3g63bd6a73e113Text 3 UUID: 547fabd2-05ae-43ee-87be-a7cfc9482956Timeline 1 Phase Index: 142Timeline 1 Dialog Node UUID: d4a79c8b-cf2b-43e6-45f3-cbb1668f73a7Timeline 1 Phase Duration: 8.93sTimeline 1 Phase Shots: 1Timeline 2 Phase Index: 148Timeline 2 Dialog Node UUID: d4a79c8b-cf2b-43e6-45f3-cbb1668f73a7Timeline 2 Phase Duration: 7.18sTimeline 2 Phase Shots: 1Timeline 3 Phase Index: 159Timeline 3 Dialog Node UUID: d4a79c8b-cf2b-43e6-45f3-cbb1668f73a7Timeline 3 Phase Duration: 8.06sTimeline 3 Phase Shots: 1End Node: True
